rationale: Educ. Code §45.005 governs attorney general examination of school district bonds. It is wholly unrelated to the TaxCode §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount and creates no conflict.
quote: All bonds issued pursuant to this subchapter, and the appropriate proceedings authorizing their issuance, shall be submitted to the attorney general for examination.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and bond examination statute.
